requirement_title: Google OAuth button when redirect is authorized
title: State transition path 2 (ALL_TRANSITIONS)

requirement_title: Google OAuth button when redirect is authorized
title: State transition path 1 (ALL_TRANSITIONS)
coverage_items: Idle--redirect_uri_provided[redirect URI is authorized]/Show Google login option-->ShowingLogin

requirement_title: Google OAuth button when redirect is authorized
title: EP - Invalid redirect URI hides Google login
precondition: Application config does NOT include 'https://malicious.com/callback' as an authorized redirect URI.
test_steps:
1. Ensure the application does not have the unauthorized redirect URI in config.
2. Initiate the OAuth login flow using redirect_uri='https://malicious.com/callback'.
3. Observe the login page to verify that Google login option is not present.
expected_result: Google login option is not displayed.

requirement_title: Google OAuth button when redirect is authorized
title: EP - Valid redirect URI shows Google login
precondition: Application config includes 'https://authorized-app.com/callback' as an authorized redirect URI.
test_steps:
1. Configure the application with the authorized redirect URI.
2. Initiate the OAuth login flow using redirect_uri='https://authorized-app.com/callback'.
3. Observe the login page for the presence of the Google login option.

requirement_title: Google OAuth button when redirect is authorized
title: DT - Unauthorized redirect hides Google login
precondition: Set redirect_uri as not authorized in application config.
test_steps:
1. Configure the redirect URI to be unauthorized.
2. Initiate the OAuth login flow with the unauthorized redirect_uri.
3. Verify that Google login option is not visible.
expected_result: Google login button is not displayed.

requirement_title: Google OAuth button when redirect is authorized
title: DT - Authorized redirect shows Google login
precondition: Set redirect_uri as authorized in application config.
test_steps:
1. Configure the redirect URI to be authorized.
2. Initiate the OAuth login flow with the authorized redirect_uri.
3. Check if Google login option is visible.
